title: Russians Are Thriving on This Thai Island, but the Scene Feels Fleeting
summary_full: Thousands who fled Russia after the invasion of Ukraine have built an enclave in Phuket. An air of impermanence hangs over their community.
summary_public: Thousands who fled Russia after the invasion of Ukraine have built an enclave in Phuket. An air of impermanence hangs over their community.
